title: TJ Maynes
description: A Passionate, Generalist Software Consultant. Problem Solver.
tagline: I write software to help people and grow businesses.
about: Solving problems on software teams is my favorite way to start the day. It excites me to pair up with engineers, designers and product managers to problem solve, automate time-consuming manual tasks and finding iterative ways to deliver value immediately.
skills: Full-stack Software Development: Javascript / Typescript, React, Express, Kotlin / Java, Spring, SQL, Bash
Automated testing strategies and test-driven development (TDD)
Continuous Integration / Delivery strategies and tooling
Automating time-consuming, manual tasks and documentation
